title: Forge modules manifest (manifests/modules.json)
description: Map of module name -> the components it contributes. The composer unions the components of the selected modules. componentKinds declares the legal component-kind keys; each module's components uses a subset of them. validate-manifests enforces that every named component resolves to a real file once the asset dirs are populated.

_note.description: Free-form authoring note; ignored by the composer.

componentKinds.description: The legal component-kind keys a module's components object may use.

modules.description: Map of module name -> module definition.

always.description: When true, this module is installed by every profile (e.g. core).

components.description: Component-kind -> list of component names. Keys should be members of the top-level componentKinds.
